'''Ryyk''' was a [[Neti/Legends|Neti]] colony. It was wrongly considered by some to be the original Neti [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], which was [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]]. Some time prior to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], Ryyk was destroyed when its star went [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]]. The remnants formed the [[Ryyk Nebula/Legends|Ryyk Nebula]].

{{Planet-stub}}
